title: bomarea alstroemerioides
intro: Bomarea alstroemerioides, also known as the Golden Glory of the Andes or the Glory of Peru, is a species of flowering plant in the family Alstroemeriaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bomarea alstroemerioides include its ability to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Bomarea alstroemerioides include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in folk medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
